category_sources: source_facts.description says it prints IP addresses in a range; official docs describe printing IP addresses from ranges and CIDR notation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official documentation title use prips.
docs_sources: Official Ringlet project page is the documentation surface with overview, install instructions, examples, and contact.
repo_sources: Official Ringlet documentation says prips is developed in a GitLab repository; GitLab search result identifies prips/prips.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IP range printing; official docs include CIDR/range examples and networking use cases such as whois.
